name: yamllint
description: YAML linter adapter (FR-415). Wraps `yamllint` to validate YAML syntax, indentation, and style conventions. Five-file layout (adapter.json + probe.sh + run.sh + normalize.sh + test/contract.bats) per FR-415 extension of the ADR-078 three-file base. The adapter.json was authored fresh as part of E77-S13 since it was missing from the gap analysis.
